slots: Sea fort, Maratha heritage, coastal views

Begin your Alibaug journey at the iconic sea fort built during the reign of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. Walk across the shoreline at low tide and explore its historic ramparts overlooking the Arabian Sea.
Golden sands, seaside promenade, local cuisine
Relax on Alibaug's most popular beach, where gentle waves, coastal breezes, and beachside eateries create the perfect afternoon escape.
Unwind at one of the region's most peaceful beaches and watch the sun set over the Arabian Sea in a tranquil setting.
Hilltop shrine, forest trail, panoramic views
Venture into the hills to visit this ancient temple surrounded by lush greenery and rewarding views of the Konkan coastline.
Discover a quieter side of Alibaug at Kihim Beach, known for its natural beauty, rich birdlife, and serene atmosphere.
Waterfront cafés, sea breeze, coastal charm
Enjoy a leisurely evening by the shore with spectacular views across Mumbai Harbour and a vibrant coastal ambience.
Island fortress, naval history, architectural marvel
Take a boat ride to one of India's most formidable sea forts, famed for remaining unconquered despite numerous invasions.
White sands, clear waters, water sports
Spend the afternoon at one of the Konkan coast's most picturesque beaches, ideal for relaxation and seaside recreation.
Portuguese heritage, coastal ruins, sunset views
Conclude your trip exploring the remnants of a historic coastal fort before enjoying a peaceful sunset along the beach.
